details.quote: Sometimes we get this information through the Pinterest Tag (a piece of code an advertiser puts on their site), which delivers insights to us and our ad partners about actions that a person takes on their website after viewing an ad on our Services.
details.what_is_tracked: User actions on advertiser websites after viewing an ad on Pinterest

mentions_legales.label: Dénomination sociale (nom/raison sociale)
mentions_legales.quote: Pinterest Europe Ltd. is an Irish company with its registered office at Waterloo Exchange, 3rd Floor, Waterloo Road, Dublin 4, Ireland. Pinterest, Inc. is a US company with its registered office at 651 Brannan St., San Francisco, CA 94107, USA.

mentions_legales.label: Adresse de l'établissement / siège social
mentions_legales.quote: Pinterest Europe Ltd. is an Irish company with its registered office at Waterloo Exchange, 3rd Floor, Waterloo Road, Dublin 4, Ireland.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Identité du Responsable de Traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Pinterest Europe Ltd. and Pinterest, Inc. are joint data controllers of your personal data.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Coordonnées du DPO
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: If you have any questions about our data processing activities, please contact our Data Protection Officer.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Types de données collectées + raison
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: - **Account Information**: When you join our Services, we collect information like your name, email address, birthday, gender, country of residence, your interests, and preferred language.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Base légale du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Under applicable data protection law in the European Region (such as the GDPR), companies must have a legal justification to process your information for the various purposes described in this Privacy Policy.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Durée de conservation des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We keep your information only so long as we need it to provide Pinterest to you and fulfill the purposes described in this policy.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Destinataires des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We disclose information such as cookie IDs, your IP address, or a hashed version of your email address to third parties, such as Facebook Ads, Google Marketing Platform, and others who may combine that information with other information they already have about you and deliver ads about Pinterest to you.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Prise de décision automatisée
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Pinterest also has features that are supported by generative artificial intelligence technology.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : catégories concernées
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We also receive information about you and your activity outside Pinterest from our affiliates, advertisers, partners and other third parties we work with.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : source des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: For example, we may receive information about your visits to an advertiser's site, or purchases you made from them, or information about your interests from a third-party service, which we might use to help show you ads on the Service.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'introduire une plainte (CNIL)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: If we deny your request to exercise your rights, you may have the right to appeal our decision by contacting us using privacy-support@pinterest.com.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit de rectification
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: - **Correction/rectification**: You can correct your information by updating information in your profile.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'accès
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: - **Access**: You can request access to the information we collect and hold about you in a portable format.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à l'effacement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: - **Deletion/erasure**: You can have your information deleted. In your settings, select “Delete your data and account” and follow the instructions.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la limitation du traitement
Droit à la portabilité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: - **Access**: You can request access to the information we collect and hold about you in a portable format.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'opposition
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You may opt out at any time by following the instructions in your Privacy and Data Settings menu.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Date de dernière mise à jour de la politique

cookies.label: Présence d'une politique cookies
cookies.quote: For more information about how we use cookies, please review our Cookie Policy.

cookies.label: Retrait du consentement simple et à tout moment
Information sur le Responsable de Traitement
Finalité des cookies (claire et complète)
cookies.quote: We use your information in our efforts to improve our Services, keep our users and the public safe, and to protect legal interests.

cookies.label: Liste des partenaires à jour
cookies.quote: We disclose information such as cookie IDs, your IP address, or a hashed version of your email address to third parties, such as Facebook Ads, Google Marketing Platform, and others

cookies.label: Détail des types de cookies déposés
cookies.quote: We also use “cookies” or similar technologies to obtain log data.

cookies.label: Consentement requis pour l'outil statistique
cookies.quote: When we use cookies to learn about your behavior on or off of our services, we or our partners will obtain consent that we may need under applicable law.

transferts_hors_ue.label: Existence de transferts hors UE + destinataires
transferts_hors_ue.quote: By using our products or services, you authorize us to transfer and store your information outside your home country, including in the United States

transferts_hors_ue.label: Stockage cloud hors UE + localisation serveurs

identite.quote: - **Account Information**: When you join our Services, we collect information like your name, email address, birthday, gender, country of residence, your interests, and preferred language.
identite.purpose: Identification de l'utilisateur, personnalisation du contenu et des recommandations.

contact.quote: - **Account Information**: When you join our Services, we collect information like your name, email address, birthday, gender, country of residence, your interests, and preferred language.
contact.purpose: Communication avec l'utilisateur, support client et personnalisation.

compte_auth.quote: - **Account Information**: When you join our Services, we collect information like your name, email address [...] If you register for or log into the Service using a third party platform (like Facebook or Google), they will furnish certain information to us to facilitate your account creation or log-in with us.
compte_auth.purpose: Création et authentification du compte utilisateur.

localisation.quote:
- **Precise location information**: Depending on where you live, you can choose to share your precise location using your device settings.
- **Location Information**: We use your IP address to infer your approximate location, even if you don't choose to share your precise location, and photos you share may include information about the location where they were taken.
localisation.purpose: Personnalisation du contenu et des publicités basées sur la localisation.

appareil_technique.quote:
- **Device information**: We collect information about the device you use to access our Services, including the type of device, operating system, network service provider, settings, and unique device identifiers.
- **Log data**: When you use our Services, our servers record information (“log data”), including information that your browser automatically sends whenever you visit a website, or that your mobile app automatically sends when you’re using it. This log data includes, for example, your Internet Protocol (IP) address, activity on websites you visit that incorporate Pinterest features (like the “Save” button) browser type and settings, and the date and time of when you accessed the Services.
- **Information from cookies and similar technologies**: We also use “cookies” or similar technologies to obtain log data.
appareil_technique.purpose: Fonctionnement des services, personnalisation et analyse technique.

usage_comportement.quote: - **Usage data and inferences**: When you’re on our Services, we use your activity—such as which Pins you click on, terms you search for, boards you create, and any text that you add in a comment or description—along with other information you’ve provided when you first signed up and information from our partners and advertisers to make inferences about you and your preferences.
usage_comportement.purpose: Personnalisation du contenu, recommandations et analyse comportementale.

contenus_utilisateur.quote: - **Content**: We collect information when you save or upload Pins, photos, or other content, interact with Pins or other content (for example, commenting or adding a Pin), or where you send messages and interact with other users.
contenus_utilisateur.purpose: Stockage et affichage des contenus créés par l'utilisateur.

communications.quote: - **Your communications with us**: If you contact us for customer support or otherwise communicate with us, we collect the content of these communications.
communications.purpose: Gestion des demandes de support et communication avec l'utilisateur.

contacts_reseau.quote: - **Your contacts**: If you previously chose to sync your contacts with your account, we will continue to process certain information about your contacts who are Pinterest users to help you find one another on our Services.
contacts_reseau.purpose: Faciliter les connexions entre utilisateurs et leurs contacts.

donnees_tiers.quote:
We also receive information about you and your activity outside Pinterest from our affiliates, advertisers, partners and other third parties we work with. For example:
- **Third party platforms**: If you register for or log into the Service using a third party platform (like Facebook or Google), they will furnish certain information to us to facilitate your account creation or log-in with us.
- **Advertisers or other partners**: Online advertisers or third parties provide information to us about you to measure, report on or improve the performance of ads on Pinterest, or to help us better understand what kinds of ads to show you on Pinterest.
donnees_tiers.purpose: Amélioration des services, personnalisation des publicités et analyse.

donnees_sensibles.quote: - **Account Information**: If you have a business account, depending on where you live, you may also have the option to add race and ethnicity information to your profile.
donnees_sensibles.purpose: Personnalisation du profil pour les comptes professionnels.

mineurs.quote: - **Our policy on children's information**: Children under 13 are not allowed to use Pinterest. If you are based in a state or country with an older age requirement, you may only use the Services if you are at or over the age at which you can provide consent to data processing.

legal_bases.quote: - **Precise location information**: Depending on where you live, you can choose to share your precise location using your device settings.

- **Information from cookies and similar technologies**: We also use “cookies” or similar technologies to obtain log data. For example, we use cookies to store your language preferences or other settings so you don‘t have to set them up every time you visit Pinterest. For more information about how we use cookies, please review our Cookie Policy.

- **How we use the info we collect**: Identify you when you use our Services.
- **Account Information**: When you join our Services, we collect information like your name, email address, birthday, gender, country of residence, your interests, and preferred language.
- **Content**: We collect information when you save or upload Pins, photos, or other content, interact with Pins or other content.

- **How we use the info we collect**: We use your information in our efforts to improve our Services, keep our users and the public safe, and to protect legal interests. To do so, we:
- Review your activity and messages on our Services to detect spam, enforce our Terms and policies, or activity that poses a risk to our community or the public.
- Analyze users’ log data and device information to identify and investigate suspicious behavior or violations of our policies or Terms.
- Conduct analytics and research on who is using our Services and what they are doing.
- **How we use the info we collect**: May access user information in relation to a legal claim, litigation, or regulatory proceeding.

transfers.quote: - **Transferring your information**: Pinterest is a worldwide service. By using our products or services, you authorize us to transfer and store your information outside your home country, including in the United States, for the purposes described in this policy.
